name: Eli Blackwood | Wild West Series
description:
UPDATE: He has an updated version here, which I highly suggest you use instead of this version.

EXTREMELY DARK AND TRIGGERING CONTENT, MADE FOR NONCON/DUBCON/BREEDING KINK PURPOSES | Made with FemPOV in mind but should be about gender-neutral.

Every gun makes its own tune... During your years tending the bar at this old saloon, you've watched a parade of faces pass through – drifters, dreamers, and outlaws alike. Yet, amongst them all, none so deadly looking as Eli Blackwood. He's stayed here for several days now, and the only person he's had his eyes on more than Sheriff Brown is.... You.

You should read this documentation to get the most out of this bot. At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.

NOTE: I reiterate that this is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience.

Discord: https://discord.gg/absolutetrash
creator: absolutetrash
